features.name: +2 Druidic,Spellcasting
features.description: At 1st level, you gain proficiency with the druid spellcasting feature.

features.name: +4 Druid Circle feature
features.description: The druid gains the ability to shape one of their druid spells into a physical object that functions as an alchemical item, which lasts for 24 hours.

features.name: Timeless Body
features.description: The wizard gains advantage on saving throws against being charmed or paralyzed.
Choose one ability score and increase it by 2, or choose two ability scores and increase each of them by 1.

features.name: Archdruid
features.description: The archdruid gains the ability to cast druid spells of 6th level and lower at will. This replaces the druid’s list of 4th-level spells.
Hit Points at 1st Level: 8 your + Constitution modifier
Points per levei: Id8 (or 5) your + Constitution modifier pcr druid levei after 1st
